topic: Why 97% of people can't focus more than 8 seconds
caption: Did you know 97% of people can't focus more than 8 seconds? 🤯 This is due to constant distractions and a decrease in attention span. 💡 Research shows that the average attention span has decreased from 12 seconds in 2000 to 8 seconds in 2013. 📊 This is shorter than the attention span of a goldfish! 🐟 To improve your focus, try eliminating distractions, taking breaks, and practicing mindfulness. 🙏 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future focus will thank you! 📚
